info.description: Interactive explorer for the current Sonos HTTP API. This spec is generated from the currently registered endpoint set in the repository and aims to be practical for manual testing.
info.title: Sonos API Explorer

get.summary: List all Sonos zones
get.description: Returns the current zone topology with coordinator and member state.

get.description: Streams transport, topology, volume and mute updates as text/event-stream.
